  Note: 'Fiscal period management and financial close orchestration record defining accounting periods and all period-end close activities for each company code. Captures fiscal year, period number (1-12 plus special periods 13-16), start/end dates, period type (regular, special, year-end), open/close status per account type (assets, liabilities, revenue, expense), and posting authority controls. Also encompasses complete close task management: task name, task type (accrual posting, depreciation run, cost allocation, IC reconciliation, balance sheet reconciliation, financial statement preparation), responsible team, planned/actual completion dates, status (open, in-progress, complete, blocked), predecessor dependencies, sign-off owner, and SLA tracking. Controls posting windows and enables close cycle management, audit trail, SOX compliance evidence, and period-end SLA reporting for F&B financial operations.'
}

Table finance.tax_record {
  tax_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the tax transaction record. Primary key for the tax_record product.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer associated with this tax transaction for output tax scenarios (sales tax, VAT on customer invoices).']
  ap_invoice_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the vendor invoice document that generated this tax posting for input tax scenarios.']
  ar_invoice_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer invoice document that generated this tax posting for output tax scenarios.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: tax_record is filed by a legal entity; replace string code with FK to company_code']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the general ledger journal entry that contains this tax posting for manual or intercompany tax adjustments.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Tax records need to be associated with the product registration to report taxes per regulated product and satisfy agency filing requirements.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the vendor associated with this tax transaction for input tax scenarios (VAT on vendor invoices, excise duty on raw material procurement).']
  clearing_date date [note: 'The date on which the tax liability was paid to the tax authority or input tax was recovered. Populated when tax_status is cleared.']
  clearing_document_number varchar [note: 'The document number of the payment or settlement document that cleared this tax liability or input tax receivable. Populated when tax_status is cleared.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'The cost center code for tax expense allocation in cost accounting. Used for non-recoverable input tax and excise duty cost assignment.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this tax record was first created in the lakehouse silver layer. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the tax transaction. Examples: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY. Supports multi-currency tax reporting.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'The exchange rate applied to convert transaction currency to local currency for tax reporting. Null if transaction currency equals local currency.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'The fiscal period (month or quarter) within the fiscal year in which the tax transaction is recorded. Examples: 1-12 for monthly periods, 1-4 for quarterly periods.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'The fiscal year in which the tax transaction is recorded, based on the company code fiscal year variant. Examples: 2023, 2024.']
  gl_account_code varchar [note: 'The general ledger account code to which the tax amount is posted. Examples: 154000 (Input VAT Receivable), 175000 (Output VAT Payable), 520100 (Excise Duty Expense).']
  intercompany_indicator boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this tax transaction is associated with an intercompany transaction between two company codes within the same corporate group. True if intercompany, False otherwise.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this tax record was last updated in the lakehouse silver layer. Supports change tracking and audit trail.']
  local_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the company code local currency. Used for statutory reporting and consolidation.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'The manufacturing plant or distribution center code where the taxable transaction originated. Relevant for excise duty and sugar levy calculations tied to production volume.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'The profit center code for internal management reporting and tax cost allocation. Links tax expense to business segments.']
  reversal_document_number varchar [note: 'The document number of the reversal transaction that negated this tax posting. Populated when tax_status is reversed.']
  reversal_reason_code varchar [note: 'The code indicating the reason for reversing this tax transaction. Examples: CN (credit note issued), ERR (posting error), ADJ (tax rate adjustment). Populated when tax_status is reversed.']
  reverse_charge_indicator boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this transaction is subject to reverse charge VAT mechanism, where the buyer (not the seller) accounts for VAT. True if reverse charge applies, False otherwise.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The identifier of the source ERP system from which this tax record was extracted. Examples: SAP_FI_PROD, SAP_FI_EU, ORACLE_ERP_CLOUD. Supports multi-system data integration and lineage.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The calculated tax amount posted to the tax GL account. This is the product of taxable_base_amount and tax_rate_percentage.']
  tax_amount_local_currency decimal(18,2) [note: 'The tax amount converted to the company code local currency using the exchange rate. Used for statutory tax reporting and consolidation.']
  tax_authority_name varchar [note: 'The name of the tax authority or regulatory body to which this tax is remitted. Examples: IRS (US), HMRC (UK), Bundeszentralamt für Steuern (Germany), Direction Générale des Finances Publiques (France).']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'The tax code configured in the ERP system that determines tax rate, tax type, and GL account assignment. Examples: V0 (zero-rated VAT), V1 (standard VAT), I1 (input VAT), E1 (excise duty code).']
  tax_document_date date [note: 'The date of the source document (invoice date, receipt date) that triggered the tax transaction. Used for tax point determination and VAT reporting.']
  tax_document_number varchar [note: 'The unique document number assigned to this tax transaction in the source ERP system (SAP FI tax module). This is the externally-known identifier for audit and reconciliation purposes.']
  tax_exemption_certificate_number varchar [note: 'The certificate or authorization number issued by the tax authority granting exemption for this transaction. Required for audit trail when tax_exemption_indicator is True.']
  tax_exemption_indicator boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this transaction qualifies for tax exemption under applicable regulations. True if exempt, False otherwise. Examples: export sales (zero-rated VAT), essential food items (sales tax exempt).']
  tax_exemption_reason_code varchar [note: 'The code representing the legal basis for tax exemption. Examples: EXP (export), ESS (essential goods), RES (resale), GOV (government entity). Populated only when tax_exemption_indicator is True.']
  tax_jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'The tax authority jurisdiction code where this tax is assessed and reported. Examples: US-CA (California), GB-HMRC (UK), DE-BZSt (Germany), FR-DGFiP (France). Supports multi-jurisdictional tax compliance.']
  tax_line_item_number varchar [note: 'Line item sequence number within the parent financial document, distinguishing multiple tax postings on a single invoice or journal entry.']
  tax_posting_date date [note: 'The date on which the tax transaction was posted to the general ledger. This is the accounting date for tax liability or receivable recognition.']
  tax_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The tax rate applied to the taxable base amount, expressed as a percentage. Examples: 20.00 (UK VAT standard rate), 19.00 (German VAT), 5.50 (reduced rate), 0.00 (zero-rated).']
  tax_registration_number varchar [note: 'The company code tax registration number or VAT identification number registered with the tax authority. Examples: VAT number (EU), EIN (US), GST number (India). Business-confidential identifier.']
  tax_reporting_period varchar [note: 'The tax authority reporting period to which this transaction belongs. Format varies by jurisdiction: YYYY-MM (monthly VAT), YYYY-QQ (quarterly sales tax), YYYY (annual excise duty). Examples: 2024-03, 2024-Q1, 2024.']
  tax_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the tax transaction. Posted: initial posting complete. Cleared: tax liability settled or input tax recovered. Reversed: transaction reversed due to credit note or correction. Adjusted: manual adjustment applied. Under_audit: flagged for tax authority audit. Disputed: under dispute with tax authority.']
  tax_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the tax transaction by tax category: input VAT (recoverable tax on purchases), output VAT (tax collected on sales), sales tax, excise duty (alcohol, tobacco, fuel), sugar levy (sugar content tax on beverages), customs duty, withholding tax, use tax, or reverse charge VAT. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: input_vat|output_vat|sales_tax|excise_duty|sugar_levy|customs_duty|withholding_tax|use_tax|reverse_charge — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  taxable_base_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The net amount on which the tax is calculated, before tax is applied. This is the invoice line total or cost base subject to taxation.']
  trading_partner_company_code varchar [note: 'The company code of the intercompany trading partner for intercompany tax transactions. Populated only when intercompany_indicator is True.']

  Note: 'Tax transaction record capturing VAT, GST, sales tax, excise duty, and sugar tax postings associated with customer invoices, vendor invoices, and intercompany transactions. Sourced from SAP FI tax module. Captures tax document reference, tax type (input, output, excise, sugar levy), tax code, tax jurisdiction, taxable base amount, tax amount, currency, tax rate, reporting period, and tax authority. Supports indirect tax compliance and regulatory reporting obligations across F&B global markets including FDA/USDA and EFSA jurisdictions.'
}

Table finance.bank_account {
  bank_account_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the bank account record.']
  cash_pool_header_bank_account_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on bank_account (cash_pool_header_bank_account_id)']
  cash_pool_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the cash pool to which the account belongs, if applicable.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: bank_account is owned by a legal entity; replace string code with FK to company_code']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Cost center responsible for the account\'s expenses.']
  legal_entity_company_code_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the legal entity (company code) that owns the account.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Profit center linked to the account for revenue attribution.']
  account_number varchar [note: 'The domestic bank account number used for payments and cash management.']
  account_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the account for treasury purposes.']
  balance_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the daily balance was recorded.']
  bank_account_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the bank account.']
  bank_address varchar [note: 'Physical address of the bank branch.']
  bank_branch varchar [note: 'Name or code of the specific branch where the account is held.']
  bank_city varchar [note: 'City where the bank branch is located.']
  bank_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the bank is located.']
  bank_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the financial institution holding the account.']
  bank_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code of the bank branch address.']
  bank_state varchar [note: 'State or province of the bank branch.']
  closing_date date [note: 'Date the bank account was closed or scheduled for closure.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the bank account record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code of the account (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  daily_balance decimal(18,2) [note: 'End‑of‑day cash balance for the account, used for cash positioning.']
  iban varchar [note: 'Standardized international account identifier for cross‑border transactions.']
  is_consolidated boolean [note: 'True if the account is part of a consolidated cash pool.']
  is_intercompany boolean [note: 'True if the account is used for intercompany transactions.']
  last_reconciled_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent successful bank reconciliation.']
  opening_date date [note: 'Date the bank account was opened.']
  reconciliation_gl_account varchar [note: 'General Ledger account used for bank reconciliation postings.']
  swift_bic varchar [note: 'Bank Identifier Code used for international wire transfers.']
  treasury_center varchar [note: 'Organizational unit responsible for the account within treasury.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the bank account record.']

  Note: 'Bank account master record for all Food Beverage corporate bank accounts used in payment processing, cash pooling, and treasury management. Captures bank key, account number, IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, bank name, country, currency, account type (operating, payroll, concentration, investment), GL reconciliation account, daily balance, and status. Governs cash position reporting, payment file generation, and bank reconciliation across F&B global operations.'
}

Table finance.payment_run {
  payment_run_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for payment_run']
  approved_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier who approved the payment run.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier who created the payment run record.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vendor, supplier, or internal entity associated with the payment run.']
  reversal_payment_run_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on payment_run (reversal_payment_run_id)']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment run was approved.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'External batch identifier from the payment processor.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the payment run for internal accounting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment run record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for the payment run amounts.']
  description varchar [note: 'Narrative description or notes for the payment run.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Start date of the payment run\'s applicability.']
  effective_until date [note: 'End date of the payment run\'s applicability, if applicable.']
  error_message varchar [note: 'Error message captured if the payment run failed.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate used if the payment run involves currency conversion.']
  exchange_rate_date date [note: 'Date of the exchange rate applied to the payment run.']
  fee_code varchar [note: 'Fee classification code for the payment run.']
  is_automated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the payment run was processed automatically.']
  is_reconciled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the payment run has been reconciled.']
  number_of_transactions varchar [note: 'Count of individual payment transactions included in this run.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment run was processed.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Primary payment method used for the run.']
  payment_run_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the payment run record for change tracking.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the payment run.']
  processing_time_seconds varchar [note: 'Total processing time in seconds for the payment run.']
  reconciliation_date date [note: 'Date when the payment run was reconciled.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Geographic region code for the payment run.']
  retry_count varchar [note: 'Number of retry attempts for the payment run.']
  run_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the payment run.']
  run_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment run was initiated.']
  run_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the payment run purpose.']
  scheduled_date date [note: 'Planned date for the payment run to start.']
  settlement_date date [note: 'Date when the payment run is settled with the bank.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system that originated the payment run.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payment run.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied to the payment run.']
  total_fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total processing fees for the payment run.']
  total_gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total gross amount of all payments before deductions.']
  total_net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net amount after taxes and fees.']
  total_tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total tax amount applied to the payment run.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payment run record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for payment_run. Referenced by payment_run_id.'
}

Table finance.cash_pool {
  cash_pool_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for cash_pool']
  parent_cash_pool_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on cash_pool (parent_cash_pool_id)']
  accounting_rule varchar [note: 'Accounting rule or policy applied to the cash pool (e.g., FIFO, LIFO).']
  audit_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who performed the initial audit entry.']
  audit_updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who performed the most recent audit update.']
  balance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current monetary balance held in the cash pool.']
  cash_pool_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category describing the strategic purpose of the cash pool.']
  cash_pool_limit_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum authorized balance for the cash pool.']
  cash_pool_purpose varchar [note: 'Specific business purpose for which the cash pool is maintained.']
  cash_pool_utilization_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the cash pool limit that is currently utilized.']
  code varchar [note: 'Business code used to reference the cash pool in external systems.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance status of the cash pool.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cash pool record was first created in the system.']
  currency varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code of the cash pool balances.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing context or notes about the cash pool.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the cash pool becomes effective for accounting purposes.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the cash pool ceases to be effective (null if open‑ended).']
  interest_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Applicable interest rate for the cash pool expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.0250 = 2.50%).']
  is_cross_border boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cash pool includes cross‑border funds.']
  last_reconciled_date date [note: 'Date when the cash pool balances were last reconciled.']
  legal_entity varchar [note: 'Legal entity (company) that owns the cash pool.']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the cash pool manager.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual responsible for managing the cash pool.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number of the cash pool manager.']
  maturity_date date [note: 'Date on which the cash pool matures or is scheduled for review.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the cash pool.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes about the cash pool.']
  owner_department varchar [note: 'Organizational department responsible for the cash pool.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the cash pool reconciliation process.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region where the cash pool is primarily managed.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating assigned to the cash pool based on financial exposure.']
  rollover_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cash pool rolls over unused balances to the next period.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system of record for the cash pool data.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the cash pool.']
  tax_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Tax jurisdiction applicable to the cash pool.']
  type varchar [note: 'Classification of the cash pool based on its primary function.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last updated the cash pool record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the cash pool record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version number for optimistic concurrency control.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who created the cash pool record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for cash_pool. Referenced by cash_pool_id.'
}

Table finance.netting_run {
  netting_run_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for netting_run']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary counterparty (e.g., business unit or external entity) involved in the netting run.']
  reversal_netting_run_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on netting_run (reversal_netting_run_id)']
  adjustment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of all adjustments (fees, taxes, discounts) applied during netting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the netting run record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetary amounts in the netting run.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the purpose or notes for the netting run.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the netting run becomes effective for reporting purposes.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Optional date when the netting run ceases to be valid; null if open‑ended.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total gross monetary value of all transactions before netting adjustments.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Resulting net monetary value after applying adjustments.']
  netting_run_number varchar [note: 'Business-visible identifier or code assigned to the netting run.']
  netting_type varchar [note: 'Category of netting performed (e.g., intercompany, cash, securities).']
  processing_time_seconds varchar [note: 'Total elapsed time in seconds for the netting run to complete.']
  run_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason or trigger for executing the netting run.']
  run_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the netting run was executed.']
  run_user varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or system user who initiated the netting run.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the upstream system that supplied the transaction data for netting.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the netting run.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the netting run record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for netting_run. Referenced by netting_run_id.'
}

Table finance.party {
  party_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for party']
  parent_party_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on party (parent_party_id)']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the party\'s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the party\'s street address (optional).']
  city varchar [note: 'City component of the party\'s address.']
  classification varchar [note: 'Business classification indicating internal vs external relationship.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the party\'s primary location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the party record was first created.']
  credit_limit_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Maximum credit exposure allowed for the party.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Default currency for financial transactions with the party.']
  date_of_birth date [note: 'Birth date of an individual party.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the party was deactivated or terminated (nullable).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the party became active in the system.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for electronic communications.']
  industry_code varchar [note: 'Standard industry classification code for the party.']
  is_tax_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the party is exempt from tax.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'The legally registered name of the party used for contracts and regulatory filings.']
  name varchar [note: 'The primary display name of the party (person or organization).']
  national_id_number varchar [note: 'National identification number for individuals (e.g., SSN, passport).']
  party_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the party by its role in the ecosystem.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms agreed with the party.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for voice contact.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the party\'s address.']
  preferred_language varchar [note: 'Language preferred for communications.']
  primary_contact_method varchar [note: 'Preferred channel for primary communications with the party.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall risk assessment of the party.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province component of the party\'s address.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the party record.']
  tax_exempt_reason varchar [note: 'Reason or code for tax exemption, if applicable.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'Government‑issued tax registration number (e.g., EIN, VAT).']
  trade_name varchar [note: 'The commonly used or brand name of the party, if different from the legal name.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the party record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for party. Referenced by party_id.'
}

Table regulatory.establishment_registration {
  establishment_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each facility registration record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Regulatory facility registration must be tied to the legal entity’s finance company code for compliance cost allocation and reporting.']
  registration_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: REGISTRATION OVERSIGHT: Each establishment registration is assigned a compliance manager employee responsible for maintaining status and renewals.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the facility\'s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the facility\'s street address (optional).']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the facility is located.']
  compliance_programs varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of all compliance programs the facility participates in (e.g., FSMA, HACCP, SQF).']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the facility resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the registration record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date the registration became effective.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for regulatory communications.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date the registration expires or is scheduled to be renewed; null if open‑ended.']
  facility_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the manufacturing, co‑packing, or storage facility.']
  facility_type varchar [note: 'Category of the establishment (e.g., manufacturing plant, co‑packer, distribution warehouse).']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent FDA/USDA inspection for the facility.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required inspection.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or remarks about the registration.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the facility.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the facility address.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration identifier assigned by FDA or USDA to the facility.']
  registration_program varchar [note: 'Primary food‑safety or quality program under which the facility is registered.']
  registration_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the registration record (e.g., SAP, TraceGains).']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the registration.']
  registration_status_date date [note: 'Date when the current registration status was set.']
  renewal_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the registration must be renewed to remain active.']
  state varchar [note: 'Two‑letter state or province code for the facility location.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the registration record.']

  Note: 'Master record of all FDA/USDA facility registrations for Food Beverage manufacturing plants, co-packers, and storage facilities. Captures FDA registration numbers, USDA establishment numbers, facility type, registration status, renewal dates, and applicable regulatory programs (FSMA, HACCP, SQF). Serves as the authoritative SSOT for all government-registered facilities.'
}

Table regulatory.facility_inspection {
  facility_inspection_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each facility inspection record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the inspector who performed the inspection.']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: Inspections are performed at a registered establishment; linking facility_inspection to establishment_registration provides parent‑child relationship.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the facility where the inspection took place.']
  audit_trail_notes varchar [note: 'Additional audit trail comments added by system or users.']
  corrective_action_deadline date [note: 'Date by which required corrective actions must be completed.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the corrective action plan.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the inspection record was first created in the system.']
  disposition varchar [note: 'Final outcome of the inspection after any follow‑up.']
  documentation_attached boolean [note: 'True if supporting documents (photos, reports) are attached to the record.']
  facility_inspection_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the inspection record.']
  facility_name varchar [note: 'Name of the facility inspected.']
  findings_summary varchar [note: 'High‑level summary of inspection findings and observations.']
  follow_up_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a follow‑up inspection is mandated.']
  inspection_location varchar [note: 'Physical address or site identifier where the inspection occurred.']
  inspection_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the inspection by the regulatory body or internal tracking system.']
  inspection_report_url varchar [note: 'Link to the digital inspection report stored in the document management system.']
  inspection_scope varchar [note: 'Areas or processes examined during the inspection.']
  inspection_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the inspection was performed.']
  inspection_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the inspection purpose.']
  inspector_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the inspector performing the inspection.']
  observations varchar [note: 'Full text of observations, notes, and 483 citations recorded during the inspection.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Government or third‑party organization that conducted or oversaw the inspection.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Risk severity assigned to the inspection findings.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the inspection record.']

  Note: 'Transactional records of all regulatory inspections conducted at Food Beverage facilities by FDA, USDA, EFSA, state agencies, and third-party GFSI auditors. Captures inspection date, inspector identity, inspection type (routine, for-cause, pre-approval), findings, observations (483s), corrective action deadlines, and final disposition. Links to establishment_registration.'
}

Table regulatory.nutrition_label {
  nutrition_label_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for the nutrition label record.']
  esg_disclosure_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_disclosure. Business justification: ESG disclosures require linking nutrition label data to product‑level environmental reporting for carbon footprint and ingredient transparency.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Nutrition labels are defined per product registration; linking provides authoritative source for label data.']
  added_sugars_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Added sugars per serving in grams.']
  allergen_declaration varchar [note: 'List of allergens present in the product as required by labeling regulations.']
  calcium_mg decimal(6,2) [note: 'Calcium content per serving in milligrams.']
  calories varchar [note: 'Total energy content per serving expressed in kilocalories.']
  cholesterol_mg decimal(6,2) [note: 'Cholesterol content per serving in milligrams.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code indicating the market for which the label applies.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the nutrition label record was first created in the system.']
  dietary_fiber_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Dietary fiber content per serving in grams.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the nutrition label became effective for the product.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the nutrition label is no longer valid (e.g., due to reformulation).']
  gtin varchar [note: 'Global identifier for the trade item, used internationally for product identification.']
  iron_mg decimal(6,2) [note: 'Iron content per serving in milligrams.']
  is_gluten_free boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product is certified gluten‑free.']
  is_halal boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product meets halal certification standards.']
  is_kosher boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product meets kosher certification standards.']
  is_non_gmo boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product is certified non‑genetically modified.']
  is_organic boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product is certified organic.']
  is_vegan boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product contains no animal‑derived ingredients.']
  label_format varchar [note: 'Regulatory format version of the nutrition label (e.g., US, EU, Canada).']
  label_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the nutrition label, typically the product name displayed on the package.']
  label_source varchar [note: 'Origin system that supplied the nutrition label data (e.g., Veeva Vault, TraceGains, Manual Entry).']
  label_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the nutrition label record.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the label was last reviewed for regulatory compliance.']
  nutrition_facts_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the nutrition facts panel, incremented on each regulatory update.']
  other_nutrients varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for additional nutrients not captured in standard columns.']
  protein_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Protein content per serving in grams.']
  regulatory_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance state of the nutrition label with applicable regulations.']
  saturated_fat_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Saturated fat content per serving in grams.']
  serving_size varchar [note: 'Textual description of the serving size (e.g., "30g" or "1 cup").']
  serving_size_grams decimal(10,2) [note: 'Numeric serving size expressed in grams for precise calculations.']
  servings_per_container decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of servings contained in the product package.']
  sku varchar [note: 'Internal product identifier used for inventory and sales tracking.']
  sodium_mg decimal(6,2) [note: 'Sodium content per serving in milligrams.']
  total_carbohydrate_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Total carbohydrate content per serving in grams.']
  total_fat_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Total fat content per serving in grams.']
  total_sugars_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Total sugars (including added) per serving in grams.']
  trans_fat_g decimal(6,2) [note: 'Trans fat content per serving in grams.']
  upc varchar [note: '12‑digit barcode number assigned to the product for retail scanning.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the nutrition label record.']
  vitamin_a_iu varchar [note: 'Vitamin A content per serving in International Units.']
  vitamin_c_mg decimal(6,2) [note: 'Vitamin C content per serving in milligrams.']

  Note: 'Master record of approved Nutrition Facts Panel data for each SKU, compliant with 21 CFR Part 101. Stores serving size, calories, macro and micronutrient values, daily value percentages, allergen declarations, and label format version. Tracks FDA-mandated label updates and country-specific nutritional labeling variants (US, EU, Canada). SSOT for all nutrition label content.'
}

Table regulatory.fsma_record {
  fsma_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each FSMA compliance record.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.asset. Business justification: FSMA compliance: Each FSMA record must be tied to the specific asset inspected for accurate compliance tracking.']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: FSMA records are facility‑level compliance records; linking to establishment_registration ties them to the registered facility.']
  qualified_individual_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: FSMA QUALIFIED PERSON: FSMA records require a qualified individual employee who signs off on safety compliance.']
  audit_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first captured in the lakehouse.']
  audit_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date the record ceases to be effective (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date the record becomes effective for compliance purposes.']
  facility_identifier varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing or storage facility associated with the record.']
  fsma_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the record.']
  importer_of_record varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the party responsible for import compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the record.']
  qualified_individual_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the qualified individual who performed or signed off the verification.']
  record_date date [note: 'Date the compliance activity was performed or documented.']
  record_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title for the FSMA record, e.g., "Preventive Control Verification – 2024 Q1".']
  record_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the compliance record, often a sequential or formatted number.']
  record_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the FSMA program the record belongs to.']
  retention_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the record must be retained to satisfy regulatory requirements.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that originated the record (e.g., TraceGains, SAP QM).']
  supplier_identifier varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external supplier referenced in the record.']
  verification_activity varchar [note: 'Description of the verification activity performed (e.g., HACCP audit, hazard analysis).']
  verification_frequency varchar [note: 'Scheduled frequency of the verification activity.']

  Note: 'FSMA-mandated recordkeeping entries covering all Food Safety Modernization Act programs: Preventive Controls for Human Food (21 CFR Part 117), Produce Safety Rule (21 CFR Part 112), Foreign Supplier Verification Program (FSVP, 21 CFR Part 1 Subpart L), Intentional Adulteration (21 CFR Part 121), and FDA Food Traceability Rule (21 CFR Part 204). Captures record type (preventive control verification, supplier verification, produce safety inspection, FSVP hazard analysis, IA vulnerability assessment), associated facility or supplier, importer of record (for FSVP), record date, responsible qualified individual, verification activity performed, verification frequency, and retention period. Consolidates all FSMA program recordkeeping into a single product with record_type discriminator.'
}

Table regulatory.product_registration {
  product_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each product registration record.']
  product_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: PRODUCT REGISTRATION OWNERSHIP: A product registration is owned by a product manager employee who drives approval and compliance tracking.']
  allergen_declaration varchar [note: 'Allergen status of the product as declared for the market.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the registration was approved by the authority.']
  batch_number_format varchar [note: 'Pattern or format used for batch numbers associated with this registration.']
  compliance_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the electronic compliance document stored in the DMS.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO code of the market where the product is registered.']
  dossier_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regulatory dossier or file set supporting the registration.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date the registration expires or must be renewed.']
  is_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product currently meets all applicable regulatory requirements.']
  is_export_allowed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product may be exported to other jurisdictions under this registration.']
  is_renewal_required boolean [note: 'True if the registration is approaching expiry and a renewal is required.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory body that issued the registration.']
  market_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the market (e.g., United States, Canada).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or remarks about the registration.']
  nutrition_facts_available boolean [note: 'True if nutrition facts are provided on the product label for this market.']
  packaging_material varchar [note: 'Primary material used for the product\'s packaging.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Broad category describing the product type.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the product.']
  product_sku varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit of the product linked to this registration.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the registration record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the registration record.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration identifier assigned by the issuing authority.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the registration.']
  registration_status_date date [note: 'Date when the current registration status was set.']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Nature of the registration action (new, renewal, amendment).']
  regulatory_change_indicator boolean [note: 'True if a regulatory change affecting this product has been recorded.']
  regulatory_section varchar [note: 'Specific regulatory code or section (e.g., 21 CFR Part 101) governing the registration.']
  shelf_life_days varchar [note: 'Maximum number of days the product can be stored before it must be sold or discarded.']
  storage_condition varchar [note: 'Required storage condition for the product in the market.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the registration record for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Country-level product registration and market authorization records for Food Beverage SKUs sold in regulated markets. Captures registration number, issuing authority (FDA, EFSA, Health Canada, ANVISA), registration status, approval date, expiry date, product category, and applicable regulatory dossier reference. Manages multi-country registration lifecycle for new product launches and reformulations.'
}

Table regulatory.label_approval {
  label_approval_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the label approval record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regulatory reviewer handling the approval.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Label approvals are tied to a specific product registration; linking captures which product the approval belongs to.']
  allergen_declaration_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether allergen statements have been verified.']
  approval_status_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent status change (e.g., approved, rejected).']
  approval_type varchar [note: 'Type of approval request (e.g., new label, revision, reprint).']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current certification status of the packaging material.']
  change_requested boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the reviewer requested changes.']
  claim_basis varchar [note: 'Regulatory basis for the claim (e.g., FTC Green Guides, EU Regulation).']
  claim_substantiation varchar [note: 'Evidence or documentation supporting the sustainability claim.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the primary market.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the label approval record was created.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the stored label artwork or PDF document.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the approved label becomes effective for production.']
  epr_registration_number varchar [note: 'Registration number for EPR compliance in applicable jurisdictions.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the label is no longer valid.']
  final_approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the label received final approval.']
  label_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the label approval.']
  label_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used to uniquely identify the label within the organization.']
  label_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the product label.']
  market varchar [note: 'Geographic market or channel for which the label is intended (e.g., US, EU, Retail).']
  marketing_claim_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether marketing claims (e.g., \'low sugar\') have been verified.']
  nutrition_facts_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether nutrition facts have been verified for compliance.']
  packaging_material varchar [note: 'Primary material of the packaging (e.g., PET, glass, aluminum).']
  packaging_test_result varchar [note: 'Result of EPA or EU packaging compliance testing (e.g., pass, fail, notes).']
  recycled_content_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of recycled material in the packaging, expressed to two decimal places.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority governing the label requirements.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Reason provided by the reviewer for rejecting the label.']
  required_changes varchar [note: 'Detailed description of changes required for approval.']
  reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the reviewer responsible for the approval.']
  submission_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the label submission (internal team or external partner).']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the label was submitted for approval.']
  sustainability_claim varchar [note: 'Text of any sustainability or environmental claim on the label.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Sequential version number of the label document.']

  Note: 'Workflow and approval records for all product label artwork, packaging copy, and packaging material compliance across all Food Beverage SKUs and markets. Tracks label version, submission date, regulatory reviewer, approval status, rejection reasons, required changes, final approval date, and effective date. Manages USDA pre-approval for meat/poultry labels, FDA label compliance sign-off, and nutrition facts panel verification. Covers allergen declaration accuracy, marketing claim regulatory basis, and ingredient statement compliance. Includes full packaging material regulatory compliance: EPA packaging requirements, EU Directive 94/62/EC heavy metal limits, recycled content percentage tracking, recyclability classification, extended producer responsibility (EPR) registration and state-level compliance, FTC Green Guides compliance for environmental marketing claims, and sustainability claims substantiation. Captures packaging component material type, compliance test results, and certification status. Links to nutrition_label and allergen_declaration. SSOT for all label and packaging regulatory approvals.'
}

Table regulatory.agency_submission {
  agency_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for agency_submission']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the product or formulation the submission pertains to.']
  submission_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: AGENCY SUBMISSION HANDLER: Each regulatory agency submission is filed by a specific employee responsible for the filing.']
  agency_code varchar [note: 'Standard code identifying the agency (e.g., FDA, EFSA).']
  agency_name varchar [note: 'Name of the government agency receiving the submission (e.g., FDA, EFSA, USDA).']
  attachment_flag boolean [note: 'True if any attachment files are present.']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'High‑level compliance domain the submission addresses.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the submission record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the fee amount.']
  docket_number varchar [note: 'Agency-assigned docket or case number for the submission.']
  document_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents attached to the submission.']
  fee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary fee charged by the agency for processing the submission.']
  fee_paid boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the submission fee has been paid.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the agency\'s review.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region of the regulatory authority (e.g., US, EU).']
  regulatory_section varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulation or code section (e.g., 21CFR101).']
  response_date date [note: 'Date the agency provided a formal response or decision.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk level of the submission for the company.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the submission was formally filed with the agency.']
  submission_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the submission content and purpose.']
  submission_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the agency or internal system for tracking the submission.']
  submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the submission.']
  submission_title varchar [note: 'Brief title or headline describing the submission.']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Category of regulatory filing such as GRAS notification, EFSA dossier, novel food application, etc.']
  submission_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the submission when resubmitted or amended.']
  submitter_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the submitter for correspondence.']
  submitter_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the individual who prepared the submission.']
  submitter_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number of the submitter.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the submission record.']

  Note: 'Master record of all formal regulatory submissions made to government agencies — FDA GRAS notifications, EFSA dossiers, novel food applications, food additive petitions, color additive petitions, and USDA waiver requests. Captures submission type, agency, submission date, docket number, submission status, agency response, and outcome. SSOT for all outbound regulatory filings.'
}

Table regulatory.import_export_permit {
  import_export_permit_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the import/export permit record.']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: Import/Export permits are issued to a specific establishment; linking to establishment_registration captures the relationship.']
  permit_submitter_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: PERMIT SUBMISSION: The employee who prepares and submits an import/export permit is tracked for audit and accountability.']
  audit_trail_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the permit record was first created in the data lake.']
  audit_trail_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the permit record.']
  cbp_entry_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'True if the shipment complies with U.S. Customs and Border Protection entry requirements.']
  commodity_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the goods covered by the permit.']
  compliance_checklist_status varchar [note: 'Progress status of the internal compliance verification checklist.']
  customs_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the associated customs filing (e.g., entry summary).']
  destination_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the intended destination.']
  duty_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Applicable duty rate expressed as a percentage of customs value.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the permit ceases to be effective (nullable for open‑ended permits).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the permit becomes legally effective.']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that qualify the shipment for the permit or preferential treatment.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date the permit expires according to regulatory rules.']
  fda_prior_notice_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an FDA prior notice was submitted for the shipment.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'International tariff classification code for the commodity.']
  import_export_permit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the permit.']
  issuance_date date [note: 'Date the permit was formally issued by the authority.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory body or agency that issued the permit.']
  issuing_office varchar [note: 'Specific office or location of the authority that issued the permit.']
  last_amended_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent amendment to the permit record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the permit.']
  origin_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the product\'s country of origin.']
  origin_determination_method varchar [note: 'Method used to establish country of origin (e.g., substantial transformation, COOL rules).']
  permit_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the permit for reporting and analytics.']
  permit_issue_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the permit was recorded in the source system.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Official permit number assigned by the issuing authority.']
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the permit is for import, export, re-export, transit, or temporary movement.']
  preferential_agreement varchar [note: 'Trade agreement that may reduce or eliminate duty.']
  tariff_classification varchar [note: 'Reference to the customs ruling that determines tariff treatment.']
  transformation_details varchar [note: 'Narrative of the processing steps that satisfy the origin determination method.']

  Note: 'Trade compliance master for cross-border movement of Food Beverage products and raw materials. Consolidates import/export permits, phytosanitary certificates, country-of-origin declarations (COOL/USDA 7 CFR Part 60), Harmonized System tariff classifications (HS/HTS/CN codes), preferential trade agreement eligibility, customs documentation, and duty rate management. Captures permit type, issuing authority, origin/destination countries, commodity description, tariff codes with classification ruling references, applicable duty rates, country-of-origin determination method (substantial transformation, COOL rules), permit validity, and shipment references. Supports FDA Prior Notice, CBP entry compliance, Free Trade Agreement qualification, and origin substantiation for labeling. SSOT for all trade compliance and customs data.'
}

Table regulatory.packaging_compliance {
  packaging_compliance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the packaging compliance record.']
  packaging_profile_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.packaging_profile. Business justification: Regulatory packaging compliance audits must reference the sustainability packaging profile to verify recyclability and EPR claims for filing.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Packaging compliance records apply to a specific product registration; linking ties compliance to the product.']
  claim_substantiation varchar [note: 'Evidence or documentation supporting the sustainability claim.']
  compliance_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance audit.']
  compliance_audit_result varchar [note: 'Result of the latest compliance audit.']
  compliance_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the electronic compliance documentation.']
  compliance_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the packaging compliance became effective.']
  compliance_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the packaging compliance expires or is due for renewal.']
  compliance_record_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the compliance record by regulatory authorities or internal tracking.']
  dimensions_cm varchar [note: 'Dimensions of the packaging expressed as LxWxH in centimeters.']
  epa_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current EPA compliance status of the packaging.']
  epr_registration_number varchar [note: 'Registration number for the packaging under the Extended Producer Responsibility program.']

  hazardous_substance_present boolean [note: 'True if the packaging contains any regulated hazardous substances.']
  heavy_metal_compliance boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the packaging meets heavy‑metal limits defined in EU Directive 94/62/EC.']
  heavy_metal_ppm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured concentration of heavy metals in the packaging material (parts per million).']
  material_certification varchar [note: 'Certification status of the packaging material.']
  material_certification_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the material certification.']
  material_supplier varchar [note: 'Name of the supplier providing the packaging material.']
  material_supplier_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the supplier holds required certifications.']
  material_type varchar [note: 'Primary material of the packaging (e.g., plastic, glass).']
  packaging_audit_trail varchar [note: 'JSON‑encoded log of changes and audit events for the packaging compliance record.']
  packaging_barcode varchar [note: 'Barcode string printed on the packaging for scanning.']
  packaging_color varchar [note: 'Color description of the packaging (e.g., clear, amber, white).']
  packaging_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the compliance record.']
  packaging_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the packaging compliance record was created.']
  packaging_disposal_method varchar [note: 'Recommended disposal method for the packaging.']
  packaging_end_of_life_instructions varchar [note: 'Guidance on how the packaging should be disposed or recycled at end of life.']
  packaging_environmental_impact_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score representing the overall environmental impact of the packaging.']
  packaging_last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the packaging compliance record.']
  packaging_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the packaging component or design.']
  packaging_origin_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the packaging\'s country of origin.']
  packaging_reuse_cycles varchar [note: 'Number of times the packaging can be safely reused.']
  packaging_type varchar [note: 'Category of packaging (e.g., bottle, can, pouch, box, tray).']
  packaging_weight_kg decimal(8,3) [note: 'Net weight of the packaging component in kilograms.']
  recyclability_classification varchar [note: 'Classification of the packaging\'s recyclability according to EPA/EU standards.']
  recycled_content_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the packaging that is made from recycled material.']
  state_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Compliance status of the packaging for the specific US state where it is sold.']
  sustainability_claim varchar [note: 'Marketing claim describing the packaging\'s sustainability attributes.']
  upc_code varchar [note: '12‑digit Universal Product Code assigned to the packaging.']

  Note: 'EPA and EU packaging compliance records for Food Beverage product packaging materials. Captures packaging component, material type, recyclability classification, recycled content percentage, heavy metal compliance (EU Directive 94/62/EC), extended producer responsibility (EPR) registration, state-level compliance status, and sustainability claims substantiation. Supports FTC Green Guides compliance for environmental marketing claims.'
}

Table regulatory.recall_event {
  recall_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each recall event record.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.asset. Business justification: Recall investigation: Linking recall events to assets used in production enables root‑cause analysis and corrective action.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal party (e.g., manufacturer, brand owner) responsible for the product.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Recall events are initiated for a specific product registration; linking provides direct reference to the affected product.']
  affected_lot_number varchar [note: 'Batch or lot identifier(s) of the product subject to recall.']
  affected_sku varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit(s) impacted by the recall.']
  agency_notification_date date [note: 'Date the regulatory agency was formally notified of the recall.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing of the product with relevant regulations.']
  consumer_notification_date date [note: 'Date the first consumer notification was sent.']
  consumer_notification_method varchar [note: 'Channel(s) used to inform consumers about the recall.']
  corrective_action_plan varchar [note: 'Planned or executed actions to prevent recurrence of the issue.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the recall record was first created in the system.']
  distribution_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic extent of the recall distribution.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any additional remarks or observations.']
  press_release_url varchar [note: 'Web address of the public press release announcing the recall.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category or segment the product belongs to (e.g., beverage, snack).']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the recalled product.']
  product_upc varchar [note: 'Universal Product Code identifying the recalled product.']
  recall_class varchar [note: 'Regulatory classification indicating severity and health risk.']
  recall_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time the recall was officially initiated.']
  recall_effectiveness_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the effectiveness check for the recall.']
  recall_event_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the recall event.']
  recall_initiated_by varchar [note: 'Whether the recall was initiated voluntarily by the company or mandated by a regulator.']
  recall_number varchar [note: 'Official recall identifier assigned by the regulatory agency (e.g., R-2023-001).']
  recall_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the recall based on risk assessment.']
  recall_reason varchar [note: 'Root cause for the recall (e.g., contamination, allergen, mislabeling). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: contamination|allergen|mislabeling|foreign_object|microbial|chemical|labeling_error — promote to reference product]']
  recall_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the recall covers the entire product line (full) or a subset (partial).']
  regulatory_agency varchar [note: 'Agency overseeing the recall (e.g., FDA, USDA).']
  root_cause_analysis varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the investigation findings that identified the cause of the issue.']
  total_units_affected varchar [note: 'Total number of product units identified as affected.']
  total_units_disposed varchar [note: 'Number of recovered units that have been destroyed or otherwise disposed.']
  total_units_recovered varchar [note: 'Number of affected units that have been retrieved from the market.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the recall record.']

  Note: 'Master record of product recall and market withdrawal events initiated voluntarily or mandated by FDA/USDA. Captures recall classification (Class I/II/III), recall reason (allergen, contamination, mislabeling), affected SKUs and lot numbers, distribution scope, recall strategy, press release reference, agency notification date, and recall effectiveness check status. SSOT for all recall lifecycle management.'
}

Table regulatory.regulation_change {
  regulation_change_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each regulatory change record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regulatory affairs owner responsible for this change.']
  product_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.product_registration. Business justification: Regulation changes are tracked per product registration to know which products are impacted.']
  change_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of what the regulation change entails.']
  compliance_cost_estimate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated financial cost to achieve compliance with the regulation.']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'Date by which the organization must achieve compliance.']
  compliance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether compliance with this regulation is mandatory for the organization.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulation change record was first created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulation becomes legally effective.']
  gap_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the gap analysis for compliance.']
  impact_area varchar [note: 'Business function(s) affected by the regulation.']
  impact_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic scope of the regulation\'s impact.']
  implementation_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Reference code or identifier for the detailed implementation plan.']
  issuing_body varchar [note: 'Agency or organization that issued the regulation (e.g., FDA, USDA, EFSA, GFSI, ISO, EPA, FTC). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|USDA|EFSA|GFSI|ISO|EPA|FTC — promote to reference product]']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or market jurisdiction to which the regulation applies, expressed as a 3‑letter ISO country code or region code.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulation change was last reviewed for relevance or amendment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by regulatory affairs staff.']
  regulation_change_description varchar [note: 'Full textual description of the regulation, including purpose and scope.']
  regulation_change_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulation.']
  regulation_number varchar [note: 'Official identifier or docket number assigned by the issuing authority (e.g., FDA CFR part, EU regulation number).']
  regulation_type varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the regulation\'s focus area.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk impact of the regulation on the business.']
  source_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the official regulation document or guidance.']
  title varchar [note: 'Short descriptive title of the regulation or rule change.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']

  Note: 'Regulatory change management records tracking new and amended regulations, guidance documents, and agency rulemakings that impact Food Beverage operations. Captures regulation identifier, issuing body, effective date, compliance deadline, impacted business areas (labeling, manufacturing, ingredients), assigned regulatory affairs owner, gap assessment status, and implementation plan reference. Enables proactive compliance horizon scanning.'
}

Table regulatory.gfsi_certification {
  gfsi_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each GFSI certification record.']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: GFSI certifications are granted to a manufacturing establishment; linking to establishment_registration records the certified site.']
  initiative_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.sustainability_initiative. Business justification: GFSI certifications are incorporated into sustainability initiatives to demonstrate responsible sourcing and production practices.']
  last_modified_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: CERTIFICATION AUDIT LOG: The employee who last modified a GFSI certification record is recorded for audit trails.']
  supplier_site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility/site the certification applies to.']
  audit_findings_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of major findings from the latest audit.']
  audit_methodology varchar [note: 'Methodology used for the audit (e.g., on-site, remote, hybrid).']
  audit_report_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number or identifier for the audit report document.']
  auditor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead auditor who performed the most recent audit.']
  certificate_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the digital copy of the certification document.']
  certification_body varchar [note: 'Name of the external certification organization (e.g., SQF Institute, BRCGS).']
  certification_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total cost incurred for obtaining the certification.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Official certification number assigned by the certification body.']
  certification_scope_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing the certification scope (e.g., FS for Food Safety).']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the certification.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the record is for an initial certification, renewal, extension, or reassessment.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes on compliance observations or corrective actions.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Deadline for completing required corrective actions.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether corrective actions were required after the audit.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code where the certified facility is located.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the certification record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code for certification cost.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the certification is considered effective (may be same as issue_date).']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date until which the certification remains valid (may be same as expiry_date).']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the certification expires.']
  external_audit_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the third-party audit provider, if different from certification body.']
  grade_level varchar [note: 'Grade or level assigned by the certification body, if applicable.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates if the certification record is currently active in the system.']
  is_multi_site boolean [note: 'Indicates if the certification covers multiple sites under a single certificate.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date when the certification was officially issued.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who performed the last update.']
  next_audit_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next surveillance audit.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes.']
  number_of_sites varchar [note: 'Count of sites covered by this certification record.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing body associated with the certification (e.g., FDA, USDA, EFSA).']
  renewal_notice_date date [note: 'Date when renewal notice was sent to the facility.']
  renewal_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if a renewal is required before expiry.']
  scheme_name varchar [note: 'Name of the GFSI scheme (e.g., SQF, BRC, FSSC 22000, IFS, GlobalG.A.P.).']
  scheme_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the certification scheme.']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of the scope (e.g., facilities, product lines, processes) covered by the certification.']
  site_name varchar [note: 'Human readable name of the facility.']
  surveillance_audit_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency of scheduled surveillance audits.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the certification record.']

  Note: 'GFSI scheme certification records for Food Beverage facilities, including SQF, BRC, FSSC 22000, IFS, and GlobalG.A.P. certifications. Captures certification body, scheme version, scope, certification grade/level, issue date, expiry date, surveillance audit schedule, and certificate document reference. Tracks multi-site certification status and customer-required certification compliance.'
}

Table regulatory.food_safety_plan {
  food_safety_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for the food safety plan record.']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: FSP APPROVAL: A food safety plan must be approved by a qualified employee (e.g., plant manager) before implementation.']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: Food safety plans are created for a specific establishment; linking to establishment_registration captures ownership.']
  initiative_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.sustainability_initiative. Business justification: Sustainability initiatives (e.g., safe sourcing) depend on the food safety plan to ensure compliance with both safety and sustainability goals.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing or processing facility to which the plan applies.']
  qms_document_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the detailed hazard analysis document stored in the document management system.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the plan received formal approval.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the approval process.']
  approved_by_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the qualified individual who signed off the plan.']
  approved_by_title varchar [note: 'Job title or role of the individual who approved the plan.']
  ccp_count varchar [note: 'Number of critical control points identified in the plan.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status of the plan against applicable regulations.']
  corrective_action_procedure_description varchar [note: 'Procedures to be followed when a critical limit is breached.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the food safety plan record was first created in the system.']
  critical_limits_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the critical limits for each CCP.']
  document_storage_path varchar [note: 'File system or repository path where the plan document is stored.']
  document_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the stored plan document.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the plan expires or is superseded (nullable for open‑ended plans).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the plan becomes effective.']
  food_safety_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the food safety plan.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent formal review of the plan.']
  monitoring_procedure_description varchar [note: 'Details of how each CCP is monitored (frequency, method, responsible party).']
  next_reanalysis_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next hazard analysis re‑evaluation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for additional comments or observations.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the food safety plan used by personnel.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the plan follows HACCP, FSMA Preventive Controls, or a combined approach.']
  product_category_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the product category (e.g., snack, beverage, dairy) covered by the plan.']
  recall_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier or URL linking to the associated product recall plan.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory agency governing the plan (e.g., FDA, USDA).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating assigned to the plan based on hazard severity and control robustness.']
  training_completion_date date [note: 'Date when required training was completed.']
  training_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether personnel training is required to implement the plan.']
